waiver_compliant.docx.description: Tests genuine compliant findings on a notice-waiver clause and a correctly-named escrow bank -- proves the pipeline can recognize compliance, not just find absences or violations.

illegal_waiver.docx.description: Tests that a clause attempting to waive a legally non-waivable protection (security deposit anti-waiver) is correctly caught as a contradiction, not accepted at face value.

lead_disclosure_compliant.docx.description: Tests a genuine compliant finding on the federal lead disclosure requirement using the correct full Lead Warning Statement text -- the one requirement-tier item we had only ever seen as absent before this eval set.

modification_blocked.docx.description: Tests a sharper, unambiguous version of the reasonable-modification issue than the real test lease's softer 'may be withheld' language -- should land clearly in contradicts or needs_review, not compliant.

table_layout.docx.description: Deposit and rent figures exist ONLY inside a real Word table, no paragraph text at all. Tests document_extract.py's table-extraction path end to end, which was built in Phase 3 but never exercised against real content until this eval set.

sparse_minimal.docx.description: A deliberately bare-bones lease missing nearly every requirement-tier topic. Control case confirming 'absent' detection stays solid and doesn't drift into false positives on a clean, unambiguous case.
